forecasts.question: Will the water network serve at least 54 sectors at the next daily anchor? (currently 53/64)
Will average sector integrity hold at or above 16 at the next daily anchor? (currently 16; decay 0.05/tick, repairs only by signed acts)
Will there be at most 64 CRITICAL sectors (integrity below 25) at the next daily anchor? (currently 64)
Will the water network serve at least 49 sectors at the next daily anchor? (currently 48/64)
Will average sector integrity hold at or above 50.7 at the next daily anchor? (decay 0.05/tick, repairs only by signed acts)
Will there be at most 1 CRITICAL sectors (integrity below 25) at the next daily anchor? (currently 0)
Will the water network serve at least 44 sectors at the next daily anchor? (currently 43/64)
Will average sector integrity hold at or above 4.8 at the next daily anchor? (decay 0.05/tick, repairs only by signed acts)

how: POST /api/forecast/stance {forecast_id, stance:"yes"|"no", pubkey, sig} — sig = ed25519 over utf8("forecast:"+id+":"+stance). One stance per key, immutable. The instruments settle it, not us.
